title: Multibao Dish Drainer Rack - Space Saving Dish Rack for Kitchen Counter, Kitchen Dish Drainer with Utensil Holder, Drain Board Cutlery Cup Holder Large Black
features: All - in - One Kitchen Organization Features a built - in cutlery holder and 4 - cup rack, allowing you to neatly store knives, forks, spoons, cups, and dry dishes simultaneously. Turns your countertop into an efficient kitchen hub for dishes, utensils, and prep tools.

Leak - Free & Mess - Free Design The angled drainage base directs water straight into the sink, preventing water pooling on countertops. Keeps your kitchen surfaces dry and clean, saving you from constant post - dishwashing clean - ups.

Rustproof & Long - Lasting Durability Crafted from corrosion - resistant materials (rustproof coated steel or high - quality PP plastic). Built to withstand wet kitchen environments, ensuring long - term use without rusting or damage.

Space - Saving Compact Size Measures 42 cm x 30 cm x 13 cm (16.5" x 11.8" x 5.1"), fitting snugly on countertops. Maximizes storage capacity without occupying too much space, ideal for small kitchens or limited counter areas.

Easy to Clean & Sturdy Structure Lightweight (1.75 kg / 3.9 lbs) yet robust. Smooth edges prevent scratches. Simply wipe or rinse to maintain hygiene. Comes with non - slip feet for stable placement, securely holding plates and cups.
description: Multibao Dish Drainer Rack-With Cutlery Cup Holder-Utensil Holder For Kitchen Counter 42D*30W*13H cm 1.75KG 4 Cups Holder All-in-One Organization – Features a built-in cutlery cup holder to neatly store knives, forks, and spoons while drying dishes. No Leaks, No Mess – Angled drainage base directs water efficiently into the sink, preventing countertop pooling and keeping surfaces dry. Rustproof & Durable – Crafted from corrosion-resistant materials for long-lasting use in wet kitchen environments. Space-Saving Design – Compact size (16.5" D x 11.8" W x 5.1" H) fits snugly on countertops without sacrificing capacity. All-Inclusive Kitchen Hub – Includes 4-cup holder, cutlery tray & drainboard. Organize dishes, utensils & prep tools in one station. Easy Clean & Sturdy – Lightweight yet robust (3.9 lbs / 1.75 kg); simply wipe or rinse to maintain hygiene. Colour: Black Dimensions: 42 cm x 30 cm x 13 cm (16.5" x 11.8" x 5.1") Weight:1.75 kg (3.9 lbs) Material: Rustproof coated steel (or high-quality PP plastic—confirm based on actual product) Drain Tray: Included, with non-slip feet for stability. Easy to Install, Anti-Rust, Securely hold the plates in place, Smooth edges Package Include: » 1x Single Tier Dish Rack » 1x Drain Tray with 360° Spout » 1x Cutlery Holder » 1x 4-Cup Holder » 1x Instruction Manual
